PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 242691 Estate of Josephine Ryan.

Appearances: George Sullivan for William O'Brien.

Mr. Sullivan requested that both matters be taken off calendar, stated that an Executor had been appointed in Kevin Ryan's estate and that she should be the Successor Executor in these two cases. Both matters were taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
